categories.description: A new Organization was added to the tenant. Fires the notification to owner/admin members. Skips the notification for the seeded default org (was_seeded=true) so tenants don't get a duplicate welcome touchpoint.
The tenant's default Organization was flipped. Audit-critical because downstream tools that filter by default org will shift results. Sends to all owner/admin members.

An Organization was moved to a new parent. Includes the descendant count so recipients see the blast radius. Sends to owner/admin members. Suppressed when the reparent was an automatic tier-downgrade flatten (that surfaces via a different notification category owned by entitlements).
